headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market At Highs, Hormuz Is Open Or Shut; Tesla Earnings Due
summary: Friday's market rally extended the best Nasdaq run in decades. But is the Strait of Hormuz open? Tesla earnings loom.

headline: Why Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) stood at $81.71, denoting a +2.94% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: Advanced Micro Devices Leads Two Finance Stocks To Highs
summary: Advanced Micro Devices is at a new high in Friday's stock market. Arrow Financial and Interactive Brokers are also touching highs.

headline: Robust Trading Activity Likely to Aid Interactive Brokers' Q1 Earnings
summary: IBKR heads into Q1 earnings release with strong trading activity, rising DARTs and volatility-driven momentum, but model signals lower odds of an earnings beat.

headline: Record Revenues, Strong Client Engagement Drive Schwab's Q1 Earnings
summary: SCHW posts record Q1 net revenues of $6.48B and $1.43 adjusted earnings, as client assets hit $11.77T and trading volume jumps to 9.9M.
